allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\szymon.kulec\\.nuget\\packages\\communitytoolkit.aspire.hosting.ravendb\\13.1.1"; $nupkg = Get-Item "communitytoolkit.aspire.hosting.ravendb.13.1.1.nupkg"; Write-Output "File size: $\($nupkg.Length\) bytes"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($nupkg.FullName\); $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.Name.EndsWith\(".cs"\) -or $_.Name.EndsWith\(".fs"\) -or $_.Name.EndsWith\(".vb"\) } | Select-Object -First 20; $zip.Dispose\(\))
